message:
fix(referral): harden referral code validation, claim persistence, and replay protection

Referral Landing Page:
- Remove .toUpperCase() normalization on referral codes to preserve
  case-sensitive signed tokens (legacy HMAC codes are case-sensitive)
- URL-encode referral codes in claim links to handle special characters
- New tests: accept valid codes after in-memory store clear, accept
  legacy signed referral codes after store reset

Referral Apply API:
- Accept referral codes that pass cryptographic signature verification
  even when the in-memory referral store has been cleared (server restart
  resilience)
- Add jfp_referral_claim cookie to track successful claims, preventing
  duplicate referral applications across server restarts when the
  in-memory store loses state
- New tests: apply code after store clear, reject second claim when
  claim cookie is present

Referral Store:
- Refactor code lookup to fall through to signature-based verification
  when exact store match fails, enabling stateless code validation
- Improve store clearing for test isolation

User ID:
- Export createSignedToken for use in referral code verification tests
- Harden user ID generation and cookie handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
